revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Nazi Germany | shortname alias = Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany (1935–1945).svg | flag alias-1933 = Flag of the German Reich (1933–1935).svg | flag alias-1933n = Flag of the NSDAP (1920–1945).svg | flag alias-naval = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-naval = Kriegsmarine | flag alias-army = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-army = German Army (1935–1945){{!}}German Army | flag alias-air force = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-air force = Luftwaffe | flag alias-navy = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-navy = Kriegsmarine | flag alias-military = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-military = Wehrmacht | flag alias-ss = Flag of the Schutzstaffel.svg | link alias-ss = Schutzstaffel | flag alias-sa = Flag of Germany (1935–1945).svg | link alias-sa = Sturmabteilung | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1933 | var2 = 1933n | var3 = ss | var4 = sa | related1 = Germany | related2 = German Empire | related3 = Weimar Republic | cat = Germany, Nazi </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Nazi Germany | shortname alias = Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany (1935–1945).svg | flag alias-1933 = Flag of the German Reich (1933–1935).svg | flag alias-1933n = Flag of the NSDAP (1920–1945).svg | flag alias-naval = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-naval = Kriegsmarine | flag alias-army = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-army = German Army (1935–1945){{!}}German Army | flag alias-air force = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-air force = Luftwaffe | flag alias-navy = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-navy = Kriegsmarine | flag alias-military = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-military = Wehrmacht | flag alias-ss = Flag of the Schutzstaffel.svg | link alias-ss = Schutzstaffel | flag alias-sa = Flag of Germany (1935–1945).svg | link alias-sa = Sturmabteilung | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1933 | var2 = 1933n | var3 = ss | var4 = sa | related1 = Germany | related2 = German Empire | related3 = Weimar Republic | cat = Germany, Nazi </noinclude> }} <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Nazi Germany | shortname alias = Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany (1935–1945).svg | flag alias-1933 = Flag of the German Reich (1933–1935).svg | flag alias-1933n = Flag of the NSDAP (1920–1945).svg | flag alias-naval = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-naval = Kriegsmarine | flag alias-army = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-army = German Army (1935–1945){{!}}German Army | flag alias-air force = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-air force = Luftwaffe | flag alias-navy = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-navy = Kriegsmarine | flag alias-military = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-military = Wehrmacht | flag alias-ss = Flag of the Schutzstaffel.svg | link alias-ss = Schutzstaffel | flag alias-sa = Flag of Germany (1935–1945).svg | link alias-sa = Sturmabteilung | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1933 | var2 = 1933n | var3 = ss | var4 = sa | related1 = Germany | related2 = German Empire | related3 = Weimar Republic | cat = Germany, Nazi </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Nazi_Germany here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Nazi_Germany for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Nazi Germany | shortname alias = Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany (1935–1945).svg | flag alias-1933 = Flag of the German Reich (1933–1935).svg | flag alias-1933n = Flag of the NSDAP (1920–1945).svg | flag alias-naval = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-naval = Kriegsmarine | flag alias-army = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-army = German Army (1935–1945){{!}}German Army | flag alias-air force = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-air force = Luftwaffe | flag alias-navy = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-navy = Kriegsmarine | flag alias-military = War ensign of Germany (1938–1945).svg | link alias-military = Wehrmacht | flag alias-ss = Flag of the Schutzstaffel.svg | link alias-ss = Schutzstaffel | flag alias-sa = Flag of Germany (1935–1945).svg | link alias-sa = Sturmabteilung | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1933 | var2 = 1933n | var3 = ss | var4 = sa | related1 = Germany | related2 = German Empire | related3 = Weimar Republic | cat = Germany, Nazi </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
